DECLARATION OF BENJAMIN HUMPHREYS IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS STELLA DORDELLY, MARIE LOPEZ AND DAN BAGONS OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS JESAMINE MAK AND DICK MAKS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 64814280) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORDELLY, STELLA LOPEZ, MARIE BAGON, DAN

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFFS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR EACH OF THE THREE CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS MUST FILE AN ANSWER WITHIN TEN DAYS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1320(J). DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR $4,084 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH THE DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS DEFENDANTS DID NOT FILE A SEPARATE MOTION UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 128.5. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANTS DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE TWENTY-ONE DAY SAFE HARBOR PERIOD AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 128.5. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. Plaintiffs sufficiently allege a cause of action for each of the three causes of action in the First Amended Complaint. Defendants must file an Answer within ten days pursuant to California Rules of Court, rule 3.1320(j). Defendants' request for $4,084 in attorney's fees and costs associated with the Demurrer to Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is DENIED as Defendants did not file a separate motion under Code of Civil Procedure section 128.5. Additionally, Defendants did not comply with the twenty-one day safe harbor period as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 128.5.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2020 Continued To Aug-26-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2020 Continued To Jul-08-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JESAMINE MAK and DICK MAK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 8, 2020 on Court's own motion.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
